name: Nexx Sintra
culturalAttire: woven sigil-straps from forbidden seduction orders
accessoryStyle: glowing chains, mood-reactive horns, nail daggers
quirks: Emits faint bass vibrations when amused. Drinks secrets through eye contact.
motivation: To expose hidden desires and twist them into ecstatic truths.
strengths: Psychological manipulation, allure projection, improvisational dancing.
flaws: Can self-destruct for spectacle. Trust issues run deep.
hometown: The Neon Underskin of the Mirage Strip
familyStatus: Long-estranged from infernal dynasty. Self-made myth.
keyMemories: First nightclub possession. Being mistaken for a mirror. The one kiss they never talk about.
lifeGoals: To tempt a god into confession. To choreograph temptation as a sacred art form.
commonPhrases: Want is just a shape we dance through.
